default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and processes for Metadata and Yorco clients, focusing on keyword research, clustering, and presentation approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metadata engagement: Focus on 5 articles/week (not 15), leverage Reddit experience, address declining organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Yorco strategy: More industry/use-case based, less competitor-focused; potential for significant traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Process improvement needed: Streamline competitive URL filtering (500 to 100 most relevant) without excessive compute](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Next client meetings: Present clean, well-developed clusters for alignment and live calibration](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

## Topics

### Metadata Client Overview

  - [Company recently "slashed"; running on fumes with minimal marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Organic traffic halved over past couple years; lowest in a long time](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Existing topical authority could help quick wins with consistent publishing](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Package: $6k/month, aiming for 5 articles/week (not 15 as with larger clients)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Utilize keyword gap analysis and competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Develop clusters for easier alignment (vs. reviewing 1000 individual assignments)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Custom GPT/ChatGPT used for cluster generation and template creation](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Consider supplementing with "missed opportunities" based on industry knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Focus on benchmarking, examples, and baselines using Metadata's unique ads data](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Need to reduce noise in competitive URL filtering (500 to 100 most relevant)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Current process too compute-intensive (200,000 credits for Boost My School)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Aim for programmatic approach to streamline filtering and relevance assessment](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Client Presentation Strategy

  - [Develop clean, presentable Airtable with 3 well-developed clusters (quality over quantity)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Schedule 1-hour follow-up meeting to present strategy, get alignment, and review calibration live](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Start with smaller, recommended list; have additional opportunities ready for discussion](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Yorco Client Approach

  - [More industry and use-case based strategy (vs. competitor-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Significant overlap with Upkeep client (maintenance management, HR focus)](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Target deskless workers in manufacturing; leverage industry terminology and compliance topics](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Potential for massive growth due to lack of strong content players in the space](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Coordinate with Sadira on scheduling follow-up meetings for both clients](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Develop Airtable strategies for Metadata and Yorco, to be reviewed by Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Marcel to lead on Yorco strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Kyle to plan second meeting structure and presentation approach](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Explore process improvements for competitive URL filtering with Dandruff](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Continue internal communication in dedicated channels for both clients](https://fathom.video/share/WH-4dScSxsGz1rRJAhHbhpmxWxzer9kv?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

action_items.description: Develop Airtable w/ competitive research, clusters for metadata. Coord w/  Marcel for recent improvements
Plan 1-hour follow-up meeting for metadata - present strategy, get alignment,  review calibration live
1) Work w/ Sadira on Airtable strategy for metadata  2) Lead Airtable/strategy dev for Yorco  3) Refine workflow to filter 500 competitive URLs to 100 most relevant
